title: calamus rotang
intro: Calamus rotang, also known as Acorus calamus, is a perennial herb belonging to the Acoraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of calamus rotang include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of cold and cough. In herbal preparations, calamus rotang is often used in the form of essential oil, powder, or tea, and is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional medicine and food products.
